hero.title: Universal Social Media Downloader
hero.subtitle: High-performance media extraction from your favorite platforms.
hero.input_placeholder: Paste link here (TikTok, YouTube, IG, Twitter, FB)...

features.title: Supported Platforms
features.description: We support all major social media platforms with high-quality output.

step1.title: Copy Link
step1.desc: Find the video or photo you want to download and copy its URL.

step2.title: Paste Link
step2.desc: Paste the link into the search bar above.

step3.title: Download
step3.desc: Click the download button and choose your preferred format.

errors.invalid_url: Invalid URL. Please check the link and try again.
errors.fetch_failed: Failed to fetch media. Please try again later.
